name: Battlefield Casualty Handling — R/simmer
postCreateCommand: Rscript -e "pkgs <- c('simmer','simmer.bricks','simmer.plot','sensitivity','triangle','truncnorm','jsonlite','dplyr','tidyr','stringr','ggplot2','patchwork','knitr','data.table','RColorBrewer','reshape2','scales','shiny','shinyBS','purrr','optparse','languageserver'); missing <- pkgs[!sapply(pkgs, requireNamespace, quietly=TRUE)]; if (length(missing)) install.packages(missing, repos='https://cloud.r-project.org')"
postStartCommand: echo 'RStudio Server available at http://localhost:8787 | Working directory: /home/rstudio/workspace'
